summary: Preserve active session model/agent across post-compaction and fallback auto-continue flows; update default Sisyphus and Hephaestus models to 5.4.
root_cause: Model-less synthetic continue prompts after compaction/fallback allowed resolver defaults to override active session model, producing default-model regressions after DCP summaries.
fix_approach: Attach stored session agent/model/variant to synthetic continue prompts and prefer session model state when deriving fallback bootstrap model before agent/category defaults.
